interactables:
  - frame_id: "95C07F13B433128B8B9FD1E3881BA42C"
    nodes:
      - ref_id: "f0:72"
        role: "rootwebarea"
        name: "The Internet"
        bbox: {x: 0, y: 0, w: 3840, h: 1742}
        click: {x: 1920, y: 871}
        source: "ax"
        actions: ["click"]
      - ref_id: "f0:84"
        role: "generic"
        bbox: {x: 0, y: 0, w: 3840, h: 439.39}
        click: {x: 1920, y: 219.7}
        source: "dom_clickable"
        actions: ["click"]
      - ref_id: "f0:86"
        role: "button"
        name: "Open Assistant"
        bbox: {x: 3730, y: 20, w: 90, h: 68}
        click: {x: 3775, y: 54}
        source: "ax"
        actions: ["click", "key"]
      - ref_id: "f0:82"
        role: "checkbox"
        state:
          checked: false
        bbox: {x: 950, y: 178.39, w: 26, h: 26}
        click: {x: 963, y: 191.39}
        source: "ax"
        actions: ["click", "key"]
      - ref_id: "f0:83"
        role: "checkbox"
        state:
          checked: true
        bbox: {x: 950, y: 237.39, w: 26, h: 26}
        click: {x: 963, y: 250.39}
        source: "ax"
        actions: ["click", "key"]
      - ref_id: "f0:113"
        role: "link"
        name: "Elemental Selenium"
        bbox: {x: 1868.98, y: 404.39, w: 281.58, h: 37}
        click: {x: 2009.77, y: 422.89}
        source: "ax"
        actions: ["click", "key"]
      - ref_id: "f0:135"
        role: "button"
        name: "Take control"
        bbox: {x: 1887.11, y: 1624.5, w: 194.89, h: 60}
        click: {x: 1984.55, y: 1654.5}
        source: "ax"
        actions: ["click", "key"]
      - ref_id: "f0:136"
        role: "button"
        name: "Stop"
        bbox: {x: 2098, y: 1624.5, w: 176, h: 60}
        click: {x: 2186, y: 1654.5}
        source: "ax"
        actions: ["click", "key"]

cdp_params.functionDeclaration: function(kind, rawValue) { const el = this; if (!(el instanceof Element)) return false; if (kind === 'checkbox') { if (!(el instanceof HTMLInputElement)) return false; el.checked = Boolean(rawValue); } else if (kind === 'select') { if (!(el instanceof HTMLSelectElement)) return false; const incoming = String(rawValue); const options = Array.from(el.options); const matched = options.find((option) => option.value === incoming || option.text === incoming); if (!matched) return false; el.value = matched.value; } else { if (el instanceof HTMLSelectElement) { const incoming = String(rawValue); const options = Array.from(el.options); const matched = options.find((option) => option.value === incoming || option.text === incoming); if (!matched) return false; el.value = matched.value; } else { if (!(el instanceof HTMLInputElement || el instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement)) return false; el.value = String(rawValue); } } el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; }

function(kind) { const el = this; if (!(el instanceof Element)) return undefined; if (kind === 'checkbox') { return el instanceof HTMLInputElement ? el.checked : undefined; } if (kind === 'file') { if (!(el instanceof HTMLInputElement) || el.type !== 'file') return undefined; const file = el.files && el.files.length > 0 ? el.files[0] : null; return file ? file.name : ''; } if (el instanceof HTMLInputElement || el instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement || el instanceof HTMLSelectElement) { return el.value; } return undefined; }
